key_highlights: S&P 500 hits record close on optimism over Iran peace deal and AI theme, with broad market rally.
Iran war 'confusion' and Hormuz blockade jolt emerging currencies and oil markets, but peace hopes drive risk-on sentiment.
Bitcoin ETFs see $2.26 billion outflows in two weeks, while Strategy pauses Bitcoin buying for bond repurchase.
Nebius Group (NBIS) reaches new highs on AI demand, Crossroads Capital thesis paying off.
SpaceX IPO euphoria fuels rocket and satellite stocks, with telecom stocks surging ahead.
Pope Leo's AI warnings and Vance's support highlight growing regulatory and ethical scrutiny on AI.
Farmers face squeeze from higher fuel costs and fertilizer shortages, while cherry farmers sell orchards.
Bond selloff concerns extend beyond inflation, with US bonds gaining on Iran progress.
Aluminum hits four-year high on China output cut fears; oil steadies amid deal hopes.
Nvidia's dominance challenges Intel and AMD; ASML remains top chip stock in Europe.

sectors.trend: Strong bullish momentum driven by AI adoption, with Nebius Group (NBIS) hitting new highs, Nvidia dominating, and ASML as top pick. Zscaler doubles down on AI security but valuation concerns persist. SpaceX IPO euphoria boosts telecom and satellite stocks.
sectors.implications: Investors should overweight AI-exposed names but be selective on valuation. Monitor regulatory risks from AI warnings and potential 'SaaSmaggedon' impact on Microsoft.

sectors.trend: Oil and natural gas volatile due to Iran conflict and Hormuz blockade, with peace hopes easing prices. Aluminum hits four-year high on China output cuts. Farmers face higher fuel and fertilizer costs. Eni advances Baleine Phase 3.
sectors.implications: Energy sector remains binary on geopolitics. Favor integrated oil majors with diversified assets. Aluminum and nuclear exposure (NuScale, NextEra) offer upside. Agricultural commodities may pressure food stocks.

sectors.trend: Bond selloff concerns persist, but US bonds gain on Iran progress. Schwab CEO focuses on wealth building over meme coins. Private credit funds expand in Asia. Insurance mogul Lindberg sentenced. BJ's Wholesale plans changes as consumers pull back.
sectors.implications: Financials may benefit from higher rates but face credit risk. Defensive plays like Schwab and BJ's offer stability. Private credit growth signals alternative yield demand.

sectors.trend: Starbucks faces backlash over 'Tank Day' campaign. Kroger price cuts met with skepticism. TJX and AutoNation see analyst reports. Ferrari launches electric model. Memorial Day sales drive consumer electronics.
sectors.implications: Consumer discretionary stocks mixed; discount retailers like TJX may outperform. Starbucks reputational risk warrants caution. AutoNation benefits from EV transition.

sectors.trend: Kardigan files for IPO to fund cardiovascular treatment. Labcorp and Cooper Companies have analyst target prices. AI in healthcare remains a theme.
sectors.implications: Biotech IPOs signal innovation appetite. Labcorp and Cooper are stable picks. Monitor AI integration in diagnostics.

sectors.trend: Ondas Holdings adds AI software to defense portfolio. L3Harris analyst sentiment mixed. SpaceX IPO fuels rocket/satellite stock euphoria. MSG Sports rallies on Knicks NBA Finals.
sectors.implications: Defense stocks benefit from geopolitical tensions and AI integration. SpaceX IPO hype may be overdone; caution on telecom stocks.

key_themes: Iran peace deal optimism driving risk-on sentiment across equities, bonds, and currencies.
AI dominance continues to propel tech stocks, but regulatory and ethical warnings (Pope Leo, Vance) loom.
SpaceX IPO euphoria creates speculative froth in telecom and satellite stocks.
Commodity price volatility from geopolitics (oil, aluminum) and supply constraints (fertilizer, natural gas).
Consumer pullback evident in retail (BJ's, Kroger) and agricultural stress (farmers, cherry orchards).
Bitcoin and crypto under pressure with ETF outflows and Strategy pausing purchases.
Nuclear energy and private credit gaining traction as alternative investments.
Bond market selloff reflects inflation and fiscal concerns, but progress on Iran provides relief.

risk_assessment.mitigation: Diversify across energy, defense, and safe-haven assets (gold, US bonds). Monitor peace deal progress.
Reduce exposure to overvalued AI names; favor companies with strong governance and compliance. Monitor Pope Leo's influence.
Avoid speculative crypto plays; focus on regulated financials like Schwab. Monitor ETF flows and Strategy's actions.
Favor discount retailers (TJX, BJ's) and defensive sectors. Monitor FedEx spin-off and freight demand.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Bond market selloff and rising yields
risk_assessment.mitigation: Diversify bond duration; consider floating-rate notes. Monitor inflation data and fiscal policy.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: SpaceX IPO euphoria and telecom stock bubble
risk_assessment.mitigation: Take profits on rocket/satellite stocks; avoid chasing hype. Focus on fundamentals.

opportunities.recommendation: Increase exposure to AI and semiconductor leaders (NVDA, ASML, NBIS) on pullbacks.
opportunities.rationale: AI theme remains dominant with strong earnings momentum. Nvidia's dominance and ASML's top pick status provide long-term growth.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy energy stocks with diversified assets (XOM, CVX) on geopolitical dips.
opportunities.rationale: Oil volatility creates entry points. Iran deal progress may ease prices, but supply risks persist. Eni's Baleine Phase 3 adds growth.

opportunities.recommendation: Accumulate discount retailers (TJX, BJ) as consumer pullback plays.
opportunities.rationale: Consumers trade down amid inflation. TJX and BJ's have resilient business models and analyst support.

opportunities.recommendation: Invest in nuclear energy and utility stocks (NuScale, NextEra, Dominion).
opportunities.rationale: Nuclear exposure gaining investor interest. NextEra and Dominion merger creates world's largest electric utility. NuScale catalyst ahead.

opportunities.recommendation: Consider private credit funds in Asia (Varde Partners) for yield.
opportunities.rationale: Private credit expanding in Asia offers diversification and higher returns amid bond volatility.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Reduce exposure to overvalued AI and tech stocks (ZS, MSFT) on valuation concerns.
defensive_moves.rationale: Zscaler's steep valuation and 'SaaSmaggedon' risk for Microsoft warrant caution. Take profits on high flyers.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Hedge against geopolitical risk with gold and US Treasuries.
defensive_moves.rationale: Gold declines on rate outlook but remains a safe haven. US bonds gain on Iran progress. Diversify with short-duration bonds.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Avoid speculative crypto and meme stocks; favor regulated financials (SCHW).
defensive_moves.rationale: Bitcoin ETF outflows and Strategy pause signal weakness. Schwab's focus on wealth building is a safer bet.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Reduce exposure to consumer discretionary with reputational risk (SBUX).
defensive_moves.rationale: Starbucks' 'Tank Day' backlash may hurt sales. Avoid until sentiment improves.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Take profits on rocket/satellite stocks (ASTS) ahead of SpaceX IPO.
defensive_moves.rationale: Euphoria may be overdone. History shows rockets come crashing back. Lock in gains.

market_outlook.short_term: 1-3 month outlook: Positive but cautious. Iran peace deal progress supports risk-on, but geopolitical tensions and bond selloff create volatility. AI and energy sectors lead. Consumer pullback and regulatory risks may cap upside. S&P 500 could test new highs if deal solidifies.
market_outlook.long_term: 6-12 month outlook: Bullish on AI, nuclear energy, and private credit. Geopolitical risks remain elevated but manageable. Inflation and fiscal policy will drive bond markets. Bitcoin may recover if institutional adoption resumes. SpaceX IPO could be a major catalyst for space economy.
key_catalysts: Iran peace deal finalization and Hormuz blockade resolution.
SpaceX IPO and index inclusion timeline.
Federal Reserve policy signals on inflation and rates.
AI regulatory developments (Pope Leo, US/EU legislation).
Bitcoin ETF flows and Strategy's bond repurchase outcome.
NextEra-Dominion merger completion and nuclear energy policy.
China output cuts impact on aluminum and other commodities.
US election cycle and fiscal policy changes.
watch_list: Iran-US negotiations and oil price movements.
Bitcoin ETF net flows and Strategy's BTC holdings.
Nvidia, ASML, and Nebius earnings and guidance.
Bond yields and inflation data (CPI, PCE).
Consumer confidence and retail sales data.
Starbucks sales trends and brand sentiment.
